actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the start of the hobgoblin's next turn.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.description: Trigger: The hobgoblin is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The hobgoblin adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

traits.description: The hobgoblin has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hobgoblin's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Longsword

actions.name: Longbow

name: Homunculus
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

traits.name: Telepathic Bond
traits.description: While the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as its master, the two of them can communicate telepathically with each other.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage, and the target is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the homunculus's next turn. Failure by 5 or More: The target has the Poisoned condition for 1 minute. While Poisoned, the target has the Unconscious condition, which ends early if the target takes any damage.

name: Hook Horror
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., darkvision 120 ft., Passive Perception 15

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The hook horror makes two Hook attacks.

actions.name: Hook
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the hook horror moves the target 5 feet straight toward or away from itself.

name: Horned Devil
senses: Darkvision 150 ft. (unimpeded by magical darkness), Passive Perception 13

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Relics. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Diabolical Restoration
traits.description: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The devil makes three attacks, using Searing Fork or Hurl Flame in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Infernal Tail.

actions.name: Searing Fork
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Fire damage.

actions.name: Hurl Flame
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 150 ft. Hit: 26 (5d8 + 4) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning.

actions.name: Infernal Tail
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature the devil can see within 10 feet. Failure: 10 (1d8 + 6) Necrotic damage, and the target receives an infernal wound if it doesn't have one. While wounded, the target loses 10 (3d6) Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. The wound closes after 1 minute, after a spell restores Hit Points to the target, or after the target or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to stanch the wound, doing so by succeeding on a DC 17 Wisdom (Medicine) check.

traits.name: Water Breathing
traits.description: The shark can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Hold Breath
traits.description: The hydra can hold its breath for 1 hour.

traits.name: Multiple Heads
traits.description: The hydra has five heads. Whenever the hydra takes 25 damage or more on a single turn, one of its heads dies. The hydra dies if all its heads are dead. At the end of each of its turns when it has at least one living head, the hydra grows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken Fire damage since its last turn. The hydra regains 20 Hit Points when it grows new heads.

traits.name: Reactive Heads
traits.description: For each head the hydra has beyond one, it gets an extra Reaction that can be used only for Opportunity Attacks.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The hydra makes as many Bite attacks as it has heads.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.description: The hyena has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d6) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Arcana. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Diabolical Restoration
traits.description: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The devil makes three Ice Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tail attack.

actions.name: Ice Spear
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Cold damage. Until the end of its next turn, the target can't take a Bonus Action or Reaction, its Speed decreases by 10 feet, and it can move or take one action on its turn, not both. Hit or Miss: The spear magically returns to the devil's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Tail
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Cold damage.

actions.name: Ice Wall (Recharge 6)
actions.description: The devil casts Wall of Ice (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).

traits.name: Death Burst
traits.description: The mephit explodes when it dies. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the mephit. Failure: 5 (2d4) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) Cold damage.

actions.name: Frost Breath (Recharge 6)
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 7 (3d4) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Fog Cloud (1/Day)
actions.description:
The mephit casts Fog Cloud, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

1/day: Fog Cloud

name: Imp
senses: Darkvision 120 ft. (unimpeded by magical darkness), Passive Perception 11
source: Monster Manual 2024 p. 177, Player's Handbook 2024 p. 352

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The imp has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Sting
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Shape-Shift
actions.description: The imp shape-shifts to resemble a rat (Speed 20 ft.), a raven (20 ft., Fly 60 ft.), or a spider (20 ft., Climb 20 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

actions.name: Invisibility
actions.description:
The imp casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

At will: Invisibility

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Succubus Form
traits.description: When the incubus finishes a Long Rest, it can shape-shift into a Succubus, using that stat block instead of this one. Any equipment it's wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The incubus makes two Restless Touch attacks.

actions.name: Restless Touch
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 24 hours or until the incubus dies. Until the curse ends, the target gains no benefit from finishing Short Rests.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The incubus casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

At will: Disguise Self, Etherealness

1/day each: Dream, Hypnotic Pattern

bonusActions.name: Nightmare (Recharge 6)
bonusActions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature the incubus can see within 60 feet. Failure: If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it has the Unconscious condition for 1 hour, until it takes damage, or until a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. Otherwise, the target takes 18 (4d8) Psychic damage.

name: Intellect Devourer
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak; telepathy 60 ft.

traits.name: Detect Intelligence
traits.description: The intellect devourer magically senses the location of any creature within 300 feet of itself that has an Intelligence score of 3 or higher, regardless of interposing barriers.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The intellect devourer makes one Claw attack and uses Devour Intellect.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Devour Intellect
actions.description: Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the intellect devourer can see within 5 feet. Failure: 11 (2d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the end of the intellect devourer's next turn.

actions.name: Steal Body
actions.description:
Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 12, one Small or Medium creature within 5 feet that has the Incapacitated condition, is a Humanoid or Beast, and has 10 Hit Points or fewer. Failure: The intellect devourer possesses the target, consumes its brain, and teleports inside its skull. While there, the intellect devourer has Total Cover against attacks and other effects originating outside its host. The intellect devourer retains its Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; its understanding of Deep Speech; its telepathy; and its Detect Intelligence trait. It otherwise adopts the target's game statistics. It knows everything the target knew, including spells and languages.
If the host body dies, the intellect devourer must leave it. The intellect devourer is also forced out if the target regains its devoured brain by means of a Wish spell. By spending 5 feet of its movement, the intellect devourer can voluntarily leave the body, teleporting to the nearest unoccupied space within 5 feet of it. The body then dies unless its brain is restored before the end of the intellect devourer's next turn.

traits.name: Air Form
traits.description: The stalker can enter an enemy's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Invisibility
traits.description: The stalker has the Invisible condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The stalker makes three Wind Swipe attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Vortex.

actions.name: Wind Swipe
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Force damage.

actions.name: Vortex
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, one Large or smaller creature in the stalker's space. Failure: 7 (1d8 + 3) Thunder damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Until the grapple ends, the target can't cast spells with a Verbal component and takes 7 (2d6) Thunder damage at the start of each of the stalker's turns.

name: Iron Golem
languages: understands Common plus two other languages but can't speak

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Fire Absorption
traits.description: Whenever the golem is subjected to Fire damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Fire damage dealt.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.description: The golem can't shape-shift.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The golem makes two attacks, using Bladed Arm or Fiery Bolt in any combination.

actions.name: Bladed Arm
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 10 ft. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fiery Bolt
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +10, range 120 ft. Hit: 36 (8d8) Fire damage.

actions.name: Poison Breath (Recharge 6)
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 55 (10d10) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Implements. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.description: The jackalwere has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the jackalwere's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The jackalwere makes two Rend or Slam attacks.

actions.name: Rend (Jackal or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Slam (Human or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Sleep Gaze (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature the jackalwere can see within 30 feet (Constructs and Undead succeed automatically). Failure: The target has the Unconscious condition for 10 minutes or until it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. Success: The target is immune to this jackalwere's Sleep Gaze for 24 hours.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
bonusActions.description: The jackalwere shape-shifts into a Medium human or a Medium jackal-humanoid hybrid, or it returns to its true form (that of a Small jackal). Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

name: Juvenile Shadow Dragon
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., Passive Perception 14

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Living Shadow
traits.description: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the dragon has Resistance to damage that isn't Force, Psychic, or Radiant.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: While in sunlight, the dragon has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Shadow Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 17 (5d6) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage dies, and a Shadow rises from its corpse. The shadow is under the dragon's control and shares the dragon's Initiative count but acts immediately after the dragon.

bonusActions.name: Shadow Stealth
bonusActions.description: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the dragon takes the Hide action.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description:
Implements. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.
Individual. The monster doesn't have a treasure hoard, but it might keep monetary treasure.

traits.name: Mimicry
traits.description: The kenku can mimic any sounds it has heard, including voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

actions.name: Shadow Blade
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Necrotic damage. Hit or Miss: The blade magically returns to the kenku's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

bonusActions.name: Eldritch Lantern (Recharge 4-6)
bonusActions.description: The kenku casts Faerie Fire, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 10).

traits.name: Hold Breath
traits.description: The whale can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Heavy Crossbow
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +2, range 100/400 ft. Hit: 11 (2d10) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.description: Trigger: The knight is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The knight adds 2 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

traits.name: Gear

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Armaments. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.description: The kobold has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: While in sunlight, the kobold has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

name: Kraken
languages: understands Abyssal, Celestial, Infernal, and Primordial but can't speak; telepathy 120 ft.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The kraken can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
traits.description: If the kraken fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.description: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The kraken makes two Tentacle attacks and uses Fling, Lightning Strike, or Swallow.

actions.name: Tentacle
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +17, reach 30 ft. Hit: 24 (4d6 + 10) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 20) from one of ten tentacles, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

actions.name: Fling
actions.description: The kraken throws a Large or smaller creature Grappled by it to a space it can see within 60 feet of itself that isn't in the air. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. Failure: 18 (4d8) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

actions.name: Lightning Strike
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 23, one creature the kraken can see within 120 feet. Failure: 33 (6d10) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Swallow
actions.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, one creature Grappled by the kraken (it can have up to four creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: 23 (3d8 + 10) Piercing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is swallowed and no longer Grappled. A swallowed creature has the Restrained condition, has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the kraken, and takes 24 (7d6) Acid damage at the start of each of its turns.
If the kraken takes 50 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the kraken must succeed on a DC 25 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the kraken with the Prone condition. If the kraken dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

legendary.name: Legendary Actions (3/Turn)
legendary.description: The Kraken can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. The Kraken regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn.

legendary.name: Storm Bolt
legendary.description: The kraken uses Lightning Strike.

legendary.name: Toxic Ink
legendary.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 23, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation originating from the kraken while it is underwater. Failure: The target has the Blinded and Poisoned conditions until the end of the kraken's next turn. The kraken then moves up to its Speed. Failure or Success: The kraken can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

name: Kuo-toa
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., truesight 30 ft., Passive Perception 14

traits.name: Gear
traits.description: Spear

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Relics. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Spear
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Sticky Net (1/Day)
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, one Large or smaller creature the kuo-toa can see within 15 feet. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition until the net is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage). A creature can take an action to make a DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check to free itself or another creature in a net within 5 feet, destroying the net on a success.

reactions.name: Sticky Shield
reactions.description: Trigger: A creature misses the kuo-toa with a melee attack roll using a weapon. Response: dStrength Saving Throw: DC 11, the triggering creature. Failure: The attack's weapon sticks to the kuo-toa's shield. If the target doesn't let go of the weapon, the target has the Grappled condition while the weapon is stuck (escape DC 11). While stuck, the weapon can't be used. The target can take an action to make a DC 11 Strength (Athletics) check, freeing the weapon on a success.

name: Kuo-toa Archpriest
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., truesight 30 ft., Passive Perception 19

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Relics. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Amphibious

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Strange Scepter
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 20 (5d6 + 3) Lightning damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The kuo-toa casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):

At will: Detect Magic, Thaumaturgy

1/day each: Destructive Wave, Divination, Hold Monster (level 6 version), Scrying, Tongues

bonusActions.name: Shield of Faith (2/Day)
bonusActions.description: The kuo-toa casts Shield of Faith, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

name: Kuo-toa Monitor
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., truesight 30 ft., Passive Perception 16

traits.description: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

traits.description: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The kuo-toa makes two Bone Whip attacks.

actions.name: Bone Whip
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Lightning damage, and the target can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of the kuo-toa's next turn.

name: Kuo-toa Whip
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., truesight 30 ft., Passive Perception 16

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Relics. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Pincer Staff
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 10 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12). Until the grapple ends, the kuo-toa can't make Pincer Staff attacks.

actions.name: Conjure Slimy Glob
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 60 ft. Hit: 9 (3d4 + 2) Acid damage.

bonusActions.name: Shield of Faith (2/Day)
bonusActions.description: The kuo-toa casts Shield of Faith, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The ghoul makes two Icy Bite attacks.

actions.name: Icy Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Cold damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 5 feet until the start of the ghoul's next turn.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't an Undead or elf, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

bonusActions.name: Watery Rush
bonusActions.description: While underwater, the ghoul moves up to half its Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Arcana. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The lamia makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Corrupting Touch.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Corrupting Touch
actions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, one creature the lamia can see within 5 feet. Failure: 13 (3d8) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 1 hour. Until the curse ends, the target has the Charmed and Poisoned conditions.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The lamia casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):

At will: Disguise Self (can appear as a Large or Medium biped), Minor Illusion

1/day each: Geas, Major Image, Scrying

bonusActions.name: Leap
bonusActions.description: The lamia jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

name: Larva
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) Necrotic damage.

name: Lemure
senses: Darkvision 120 ft. (unimpeded by magical darkness), Passive Perception 10

traits.name: Hellish Restoration
traits.description: If the lemure dies in the Nine Hells, it revives with all its Hit Points in 1d10 days unless it is killed by a creature under the effects of a Bless spell or its remains are sprinkled with Holy Water.

actions.name: Vile Slime
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

traits.name: Gear
traits.description: Component Pouch

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Arcana. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
traits.description: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Spirit Jar
traits.description: If destroyed, the lich reforms in 1d10 days if it has a spirit jar, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the lich's lair.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The lich makes three attacks, using Eldritch Burst or Paralyzing Touch in any combination.

actions.name: Eldritch Burst
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +12, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 31 (4d12 + 5) Force damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) Cold damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the start of the lich's next turn.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The lich casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):

At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic, Fireball (level 5 version), Invisibility, Lightning Bolt (level 5 version), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation

2/day each: Animate Dead, Dimension Door, Plane Shift

1/day each: Chain Lightning, Finger of Death, Power Word Kill, Scrying

reactions.name: Protective Magic
reactions.description: The lich casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

legendary.name: Legendary Actions (3/Turn)
legendary.description: The Lich can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. The Lich regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn.

legendary.name: Deathly Teleport
legendary.description: The lich teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and each creature within 10 feet of the space it left takes 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage.

legendary.name: Disrupt Life
legendary.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, each creature that isn't an Undead in a 20-foot Emanation originating from the lich. Failure: 31 (9d6) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Frightening Gaze
legendary.description: The lich casts Fear, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

name: Lion
source: Monster Manual 2024 p. 364, Player's Handbook 2024 p. 352

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.description: The lion has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the lion's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Running Leap
traits.description: With a 10-foot running start, the lion can Long Jump up to 25 feet.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The lion makes two Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Roar.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Roar
actions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, one creature within 15 feet. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the start of the lion's next turn.

name: Lizard
source: Monster Manual 2024 p. 364, Player's Handbook 2024 p. 353

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.description: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Individual. The monster doesn't have a treasure hoard, but it might keep monetary treasure.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The lizardfolk makes two Earth Burst attacks.

actions.name: Earth Burst
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Hail of Stone (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point the lizardfolk can see within 60 feet. Failure: 15 (6d4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The lizardfolk casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):

At will: Elementalism

1/day each: Meld into Stone, Speak with Plants, Spike Growth

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Individual. The monster doesn't have a treasure hoard, but it might keep monetary treasure.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The lizardfolk makes one Bite attack and one Earthen Maul attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't a Construct or an Undead, the lizardfolk gains Temporary Hit Points equal to the damage dealt.

actions.name: Earthen Maul
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

bonusActions.name: Charge
bonusActions.description: The lizardfolk moves up to its Speed or Swim Speed straight toward an enemy it can see.

traits.name: Gear
traits.description: Wand

The mage casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):

2/day each: Fireball (level 4 version), Invisibility

1/day each: Cone of Cold, Fly

bonusActions.name: Misty Step (3/Day)

reactions.name: Protective Magic (3/Day)

actions.name: Arcane Burst

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The mage casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks):

At will: Mage Hand, Prestidigitation

1/day each: Disguise Self, Ice Knife, Mage Armor (included in AC), Thunderwave

traits.name: Death Burst
traits.description: The mephit explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the mephit. Failure: 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 6)
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

traits.name: Death Burst
traits.description: The magmin explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the magmin. Failure: 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Touch
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning.

bonusActions.name: Ignited Illumination
bonusActions.description: The magmin sets itself ablaze or extinguishes its flames. While ablaze, the magmin sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The mammoth makes two Gore attacks.

actions.name: Gore
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature and the mammoth moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

bonusActions.name: Trample
bonusActions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 18, one creature within 5 feet that has the Prone condition. Failure: 29 (4d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (2d4) Slashing damage.

traits.name: Contortionist
traits.description: The manes can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Sickening Vapors
traits.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the manes at the end of the manes's turn. Failure: The target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn. Success: The target is immune to this manes's Sickening Vapors for 24 hours.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 5 (2d4) Necrotic damage.

bonusActions.name: Shadow Stealth
bonusActions.description: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the manes takes the Hide action.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The manticore makes three attacks, using Rend or Tail Spike in any combination.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail Spike
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 100/200 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

name: Marid
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., darkvision 120 ft., Passive Perception 13

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Relics. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The marid can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Elemental Restoration
traits.description: If the marid dies outside the Elemental Plane of Water, its body dissolves into brine, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Water.

traits.name: Wishes
traits.description: The marid has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the marid knows it, the marid can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the marid can understand. If the marid casts the spell for the creature, the marid suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the marid has cast it three times, the marid can't do so again for 365 days.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The marid makes three Aquatic Lash attacks.

actions.name: Aquatic Lash
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 15 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Cold damage.

actions.name: Water Jet
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot-long, 10-foot-wide Line. Failure: 31 (9d6) Cold damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is pushed up to 20 feet straight away from the marid and has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The marid casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):

At will: Create or Destroy Water, Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Purify Food and Drink

1/day each: Control Water, Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Plane Shift, Tongues

bonusActions.name: Misty Veil (Recharge 5-6)
bonusActions.description: The marid casts Fog Cloud, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Armaments. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.description: If the marilith dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The marilith has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Reactive
traits.description: The marilith can take one Reaction on every turn of combat.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The marilith makes six Pact Blade attacks and uses Constrict.

actions.name: Pact Blade
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Constrict
actions.description: Strength Saving Throw: DC 17, one Medium or smaller creature the marilith can see within 5 feet. Failure: 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

bonusActions.name: Teleport (Recharge 5-6)
bonusActions.description: The marilith teleports up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.description: Trigger: The marilith is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The marilith adds 5 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

name: Mastiff
source: Monster Manual 2024 p. 365, Player's Handbook 2024 p. 353

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The medusa makes two Claw attacks and one Snake Hair attack, or it makes three Poison Ray attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Snake Hair
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Poison Ray
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 150 ft. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) Poison damage.

bonusActions.name: Petrifying Gaze (Recharge 5-6)
bonusActions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. If the medusa sees its reflection in the Cone, the medusa must make this save. First Failure: The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second Failure: The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Individual. The monster doesn't have a treasure hoard, but it might keep monetary treasure.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The merfolk can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Ocean Spear
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 3 (1d6) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Cold damage. If the target is a creature, its Speed decreases by 10 feet until the end of its next turn. Hit or Miss: The spear magically returns to the merfolk's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Individual. The monster doesn't have a treasure hoard, but it might keep monetary treasure.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The merfolk can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The merfolk makes two Aquatic Burst attacks.

actions.name: Aquatic Burst
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) Cold damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The merfolk casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

At will: Elementalism, Light

1/day each: Control Water, Create or Destroy Water

reactions.name: Watery Rebuke
reactions.description: Trigger: An enemy the merfolk can see enters a space within 5 feet of the merfolk. Response: dStrength Saving Throw: DC 15, the triggering enemy. Failure: 14 (4d6) Cold damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is pushed up to 30 feet straight away from the merfolk by conjured water.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The merrow can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The merrow makes two attacks, using Bite, Claw, or Harpoon in any combination.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the merrow's next turn.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Harpoon
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the merrow pulls the target up to 15 feet straight toward itself.

name: Mezzoloth
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., darkvision 60 ft., Passive Perception 15

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Armaments. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Fiendish Restoration
traits.description: If the mezzoloth dies outside Gehenna, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Gehenna.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The mezzoloth has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The mezzoloth makes two attacks, using Claws or Mercurial Trident in any combination.

actions.name: Claws
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from two of four claws, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

actions.name: Mercurial Trident
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Force damage. Hit or Miss: The trident magically returns to the mezzoloth's claw immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The mezzoloth casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):

1/day each: Cloudkill, Darkness, Dispel Magic

bonusActions.name: Teleport (Recharge 5-6)
bonusActions.description: The mezzoloth teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. It can teleport one creature it is grappling to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of its destination space.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Adhesive (Object Form Only)
traits.description: The mimic adheres to anything that touches it. A Huge or smaller creature adhered to the mimic has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have Disadvantage.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5 (with Advantage if the target is Grappled by the mimic), reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage—or 12 (2d8 + 3) Piercing damage if the target is Grappled by the mimic—plus 4 (1d8) Acid damage.

actions.name: Pseudopod
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Acid damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have Disadvantage.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
bonusActions.description: The mimic shape-shifts to resemble a Medium or Small object while retaining its game statistics, or it returns to its true blob form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Gear
traits.description: Breastplate

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Arcana. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.description: The mind flayer has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) Psychic damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from all the mind flayer's tentacles, and the target has the Stunned condition until the grapple ends.

actions.name: Extract Brain
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature that is Grappled by the mind flayer's Tentacles. Failure: 55 (10d10) Piercing damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: If this damage reduces the target to 0 Hit Points, the mind flayer kills it and devours its brain.

actions.name: Mind Blast (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 31 (6d8 + 4) Psychic damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the end of the mind flayer's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The mind flayer casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):

At will: Detect Thoughts

1/day each: Dominate Monster, Plane Shift (self only)

traits.name: Gear
traits.description: Breastplate

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Arcana. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The mind flayer has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The mind flayer makes three Arcane Tentacles attacks.

actions.name: Arcane Tentacles
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) Psychic damage, and the mind flayer can teleport the target up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space the mind flayer can see on a surface or liquid large enough to support the target. If this damage reduces the target to 0 Hit Points, the mind flayer kills it and magically devours its brain.

actions.name: Mind Burst (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 17, each creature in a 40-foot Emanation originating from the mind flayer. Failure: 41 (8d8 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the end of the mind flayer's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The mind flayer casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Disguise Self, Mage Hand (the hand is Invisible)

1/day each: Clairvoyance, Dimension Door, Fireball (level 5 version), Lightning Bolt (level 5 version), Plane Shift (self only), Sending

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The mummy makes two Rotting Fist attacks and uses Dreadful Glare.

actions.name: Rotting Fist
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target can't regain Hit Points, its Hit Point maximum doesn't return to normal when finishing a Long Rest, and its Hit Point maximum decreases by 10 (3d6) every 24 hours that elapse. A creature dies and turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack.

actions.name: Dreadful Glare
actions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, one creature the mummy can see within 60 feet. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the end of the mummy's next turn. Success: The target is immune to this mummy's Dreadful Glare for 24 hours.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Relics. The monster's treasure hoard features magic items with the noted theme. The Dungeon Master's Guide details treasure hoards appropriate for each theme.

traits.name: Size
traits.description: Small, Medium

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
traits.description: If the mummy fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The mummy has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
traits.description: If destroyed, the mummy gains a new body in 24 hours if its heart is intact, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the mummy's lair. The heart is a Tiny object that has AC 17, HP 10, and Immunity to all damage except Fire.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The mummy makes one Rotting Fist or Channel Negative Energy attack, and it uses Dreadful Glare.

actions.name: Rotting Fist
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target can't regain Hit Points, it gains no benefit from finishing a Long Rest, and its Hit Point maximum decreases by 10 (3d6) every 24 hours that elapse. A creature dies and turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack.

actions.name: Channel Negative Energy
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 60 ft. Hit: 25 (6d6 + 4) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Dreadful Glare
actions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature the mummy can see within 60 feet. Failure: 25 (6d6 + 4) Psychic damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of the mummy's next turn.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The mummy casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks):

At will: Dispel Magic, Thaumaturgy

1/day each: Animate Dead, Harm, Insect Plague (level 7 version)

reactions.name: Whirlwind of Sand
reactions.description: Trigger: The mummy is hit by an attack roll. Response: The mummy adds 2 to its AC against the attack, possibly causing the attack to miss, and the mummy teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Each creature of its choice that it can see within 5 feet of its destination space has the Blinded condition until the end of the mummy's next turn.

legendary.name: Legendary Actions (3/Turn)
legendary.description: The Mummy Lord can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. The Mummy Lord regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn.

legendary.name: Glare
legendary.description: The mummy uses Dreadful Glare. The mummy can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Necrotic Strike
legendary.description: The mummy makes one Rotting Fist or Channel Negative Energy attack.

legendary.name: Dread Command
legendary.description: The mummy casts Command (level 2 version), using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The mummy can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

actions.description: The myconid expels spores in a 30-foot Emanation originating from itself. Creatures in that area with an Intelligence score of 2 or higher that aren't Constructs, Elementals, or Undead gain telepathy with a range of 30 feet for 1 hour.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The hag has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Soul Bag
traits.description:
The hag has a soul bag. While holding or carrying the bag, the hag can use its Nightmare Haunting action.
The bag has AC 15, HP 20, and Resistance to all damage. The bag turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points. If the bag is destroyed, any souls the bag is holding are released. The hag can create a new bag after 7 days.

traits.name: Coven Magic
traits.description: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the hag can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14): Augury, Find Familiar, Identify, Locate Object, Scrying, or Unseen Servant. The hag must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The hag makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):

At will: Detect Magic, Etherealness, Magic Missile (level 4 version)

2/day each: Phantasmal Killer, Plane Shift (self only)

actions.name: Nightmare Haunting (1/Day; Requires Soul Bag)
actions.description:
While on the Ethereal Plane, the hag casts Dream, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. Only the hag can serve as the spell's messenger, and the target must be a creature the hag can see on the Material Plane. The spell fails and is wasted if the target is under the effect of the Protection from Evil and Good spell or within a Magic Circle spell.

1/day: Dream, Protection from Evil and Good, Magic Circle

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
bonusActions.description: The hag shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

Response: The jelly splits into two new Ochre Jellies. Each new jelly is one size smaller than the original jelly and acts on its Initiative. The original jelly's Hit Points are divided evenly between the new jellies (round down).

The Cube is Heavily Obscured for 1 minute or until a strong current or similar effect disperses the ink.

traits.description: When you regain Hit Points from a level 1+ spell, the steed regains the same number of Hit Points if you're within 5 feet of it.

actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 + the spell's level of Radiant (Celestial), Psychic (Fey), or Necrotic (Fiend) damage.

While Poisoned, the target can't regain Hit Points and takes 21 (6d6) Poison damage at the start of each of its turns, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. Hit: 22 (3d8 + 9) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 19), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. Hit: 16 (2d6 + 9) Piercing damage plus 35 (10d6) Poison damage.

bonusActions.name: Swallow
bonusActions.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC 19, one Large or smaller creature Grappled by the worm (it can have up to three creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: The target is swallowed by the worm, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the worm, and takes 17 (5d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the worm's turns.
If the worm takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the worm must succeed on a DC 21 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the worm and has the Prone condition. If the worm dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 20 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

traits.description: If the rakshasa dies outside the Nine Hells, its body turns to ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The rakshasa makes three Cursed Touch attacks.

actions.name: Cursed Touch
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 19 (3d12) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target gains no benefit from finishing a Short or Long Rest.

actions.name: Baleful Command (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 18, each enemy in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the rakshasa. Failure: 28 (8d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened and Incapacitated conditions until the start of the rakshasa's next turn.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The rakshasa casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):

At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Disguise Self, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion

1/day each: Fly, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift

name: Rat
source: Monster Manual 2024 p. 367, Player's Handbook 2024 p. 355

traits.name: Agile
traits.description: The rat doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

name: Raven
source: Monster Manual 2024 p. 368, Player's Handbook 2024 p. 355

traits.name: Mimicry
traits.description: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a whisper or chitter. A hearer can discern the sounds are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.

actions.name: Beak
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

name: Red Dragon Wyrmling
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., Passive Perception 14

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 24 (7d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.description: The slaad regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The slaad makes three Injecting Claw attacks.

actions.name: Injecting Claw
actions.description:
Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Humanoid not cursed by a slaad, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14. Failure: The target is cursed unawares, and a minuscule slaad egg is implanted in it. Removing the curse destroys the egg.
Over 2d4 × 10 days, the egg gestates. In the final 24 hours, the cursed target feels unwell; its Speed is halved, and it has Disadvantage on D20 Tests. At the end of this time, the egg turns into a Slaad Tadpole, which chews out of the host and kills it.

name: Reef Shark
source: Monster Manual 2024 p. 368, Player's Handbook 2024 p. 356

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.description: The shark has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the shark's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Water Breathing
traits.description: The shark can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

name: Remorhaz
senses: Darkvision 60 ft., tremorsense 60 ft., Passive Perception 10

traits.name: Heat Aura
traits.description: At the end of each of the remorhaz's turns, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the remorhaz takes 16 (3d10) Fire damage.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +11, reach 10 ft. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Fire damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 17), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

bonusActions.name: Swallow
bonusActions.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC 19, one Large or smaller creature Grappled by the remorhaz (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: The target is swallowed by the remorhaz, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, it has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the remorhaz, and it takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage at the start of each of the remorhaz's turns.
If the remorhaz takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the remorhaz must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the remorhaz and has the Prone condition. If the remorhaz dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.description: The revenant regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. If the revenant takes Fire or Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. Its body is destroyed only if it starts its turn with 0 Hit Points and doesn't regenerate.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
traits.description: If the revenant dies, it revives 24 hours later in a different body unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on its corpse. If it revives, it animates a Humanoid corpse elsewhere on the same plane of existence; it now looks different but uses the same stat block and returns with all its Hit Points.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The revenant uses Vengeful Glare and makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Vengeful Glare
actions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature the revenant can see within 30 feet. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. If the Frightened target is cursed by the revenant (see Vow of Revenge), the target also has the Paralyzed condition for the duration.

bonusActions.name: Vow of Revenge (1/Day)
bonusActions.description: The revenant curses one creature it can see within 30 feet of itself. The revenant knows the distance to and direction of the cursed target, even if it is on a different plane of existence. The curse ends on the target if the revenant uses this Bonus Action on a different creature.

actions.name: Gore
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage. If target is a Large or smaller creature and the rhinoceros moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

name: Riding Horse
source: Monster Manual 2024 p. 368, Player's Handbook 2024 p. 356

actions.name: Hooves
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The roc makes two Beak attacks. It can replace one attack with a Talons attack.

actions.name: Beak
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 10 ft. Hit: 28 (3d12 + 9) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Talons
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 5 ft. Hit: 23 (4d6 + 9) Slashing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 19) from both talons, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

bonusActions.name: Swoop (Recharge 5-6)
bonusActions.description: If the roc has a creature Grappled, the roc flies up to half its Fly Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks and drops that creature.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.description: The roper can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The roper makes two Tentacle attacks, uses Reel, and makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Tentacle
actions.description:
Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 60 ft. Hit: The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of six tentacles, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the grapple ends.
The tentacle can be damaged, freeing a creature it has Grappled when destroyed (AC 20, HP 10, Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage). Damaging the tentacle deals no damage to the roper, and a destroyed tentacle regrows at the start of the roper's next turn.

actions.name: Reel
actions.description: The roper pulls each creature Grappled by it up to 30 feet straight toward it.

traits.name: Iron Scent
traits.description: The rust monster can pinpoint the location of ferrous metal within 30 feet of itself.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The rust monster makes one Bite attack and uses Antennae twice.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Antennae
actions.description: The rust monster targets one nonmagical metal object—armor or a weapon—worn or carried by a creature within 5 feet of itself. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, the creature with the object. Failure: The object takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers (armor) or to its attack rolls (weapon). Armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10, and a weapon is destroyed if its penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor or weapon.

actions.name: Destroy Metal
actions.description: The rust monster touches a nonmagical metal object within 5 feet of itself that isn't being worn or carried. The touch destroys a 1-foot Cube of the object.

reactions.name: Reflexive Antennae
reactions.description: Trigger: An attack roll hits the rust monster. Response: The rust monster uses Antennae.

traits.name: Running Leap
traits.description: With a 10-foot running start, the tiger can Long Jump up to 25 feet.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The tiger makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

bonusActions.name: Nimble Escape
bonusActions.description: The tiger takes the Disengage or Hide action.

traits.name: Gear
traits.description: Breastplate, Trident

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Blood Frenzy
traits.description: The sahuagin has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its Hit Points.

traits.name: Limited Amphibiousness
traits.description: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it must be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating outside water.

traits.name: Shark Telepathy
traits.description: The sahuagin can magically control sharks within 120 feet of itself, using a special telepathy.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The sahuagin makes three Trident attacks.

actions.name: Trident
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

reactions.name: Fiendish Blood
reactions.description: Trigger: The sahuagin takes Piercing or Slashing damage. Response: dConstitution Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature of the sahuagin's choice in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the sahuagin. Failure: 10 (3d6) Acid damage, and the target is cursed until it finishes a Short or Long Rest. While cursed, the target can't benefit from the Invisible condition, its Speed decreases by 10 feet, and all Fiends within 120 feet of the target can sense its location regardless of interposing obstacles.

traits.name: Treasure
traits.description: Any. The monster's treasure hoard can include monetary treasure and any kinds of magic items.

traits.name: Blood Frenzy
traits.description: The sahuagin has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its Hit Points.

traits.name: Limited Amphibiousness
traits.description: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it must be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating outside water.

traits.name: Shark Telepathy
traits.description: The sahuagin can magically control sharks within 120 feet of itself, using a special telepathy.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The sahuagin makes two Spectral Jaws attacks.

actions.name: Spectral Jaws
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) Force damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The sahuagin casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):

At will: Thaumaturgy

2/day each: Hold Person, Tongues

bonusActions.name: Fiendish Aid (2/Day)
bonusActions.description: The sahuagin casts Bless or Healing Word, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

traits.name: Treasure

traits.name: Blood Frenzy
traits.description: The sahuagin has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its Hit Points.

traits.name: Limited Amphibiousness
traits.description: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it must be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating outside water.

traits.name: Shark Telepathy
traits.description: The sahuagin can magically control sharks within 120 feet of itself, using a special telepathy.

actions.name: Multiattack

actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Slashing damage.

bonusActions.name: Aquatic Charge
bonusActions.description: The sahuagin swims up to its Swim Speed straight toward an enemy it can see.

traits.name: Fire Aura
